description: Canonical HarnessStage taxonomy consumed by RoutingPolicy and HarnessDecisionView. Order here is the default display order for the Gearshift pill row.

stages.description: Requirements gathering and interactive spec interview.
Design-pass reasoning before generation — architecture, file layout, sub-task decomposition.
Grades generator output against the spec and wisdom rules; may invoke vision for UI evals.
Mid-generation tool-use dispatch (Phase TC tool catalog).
Post-failure repair — small, focused patches to generator output.
